hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Direct access to localhost:<port> is prohibited. Use the UI hostname defined in the project CLAUDE.md.'}) if re.search(r'localhost:\d{4,5}',cmd) else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','additionalContext':'[Visual Check] When committing frontend UI changes, you must first verify with Playwright MCP screenshots that everything looks correct. Abort the commit if not verified.'}}) if re.search(r'git\s+commit', cmd) else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); pat=r'git\s+add\s+.*(\.env|credentials|secrets)'; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Staging secret files (.env, credentials, etc.) is prohibited.'}) if re.search(pat,cmd) else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'git push --force is prohibited.'}) if re.search(r'git\s+push\s+.*--force',cmd) or re.search(r'git\s+push\s+-f\b',cmd) else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); m=re.search(r'git\s+push\s+(?:.*\s+)?(?:origin\s+)?(main|master)\b',cmd); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Direct push to main/master is prohibited. Use a pull request.'}) if m else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); path=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('path','') or d.get('tool_input',{}).get('filename','') or ''; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Do not save screenshots to the repository root. Save to docs/generated/{project}/screenshots/ instead.'}) if (path and 'docs/generated' not in path and '/tmp' not in path) else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); url=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('url',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Direct access to localhost:<port> is prohibited. Use the UI hostname defined in the project CLAUDE.md.'}) if re.search(r'localhost:\d{4,5}',url) else json.dumps({'continue':True}))"
